headline: Raymond James sets SpaceX Street-high target, cites defining infrastructure role
summary: Investing.com -- Raymond James initiated coverage of Space Exploration Technologies (SpaceX) with a Strong Buy rating and an $800 price target in a note on Tuesday, the highest on Wall Street, calling SpaceX "one of the defining industrial infrastructure companies of the 21st century."
